meaning: <拉>Litterarum Humaniorum Doctor古典文学博士(=Doctor of HumaneLetters或Doctor of Humanities)
examples: Diesel driven LHD units are highly efficient ore hauling equipment in underground mining operations.
Tests were made on the strength of ACY-2 LHD machine's bodywork structure, which validated the correctness of the FE model.
Tracking path is one of basic task for the LHD unit auto-drive, sometime midline of tunnel is considered as the LHD's expectation path.
